profile.name: 0xPamilerin
profile.summary: I’m a passionate cinematographer and front-end developer dedicated to creating visually engaging stories and seamless digital experiences.

experience.summary: Designed and developed visually appealing e-learning modules, transforming static curriculum into interactive digital courses using specialized instructional software.
highlights: Integrated Synthesia AI avatars and multimedia within Articulate Rise 360, applying visual composition principles to enhance student engagement.
Managed the end-to-end course creation lifecycle, from storyboarding to exporting SCORM packages for seamless LMS deployment.

experience.role: Light and Sound Technician, Assistant Camera Operator
highlights: Coordinated lighting rigs and audio levels for diverse shoots, applying cinematography principles to enhance visual composition and audio clarity.
experience.summary: Managed on-set audio and visual equipment, ensuring optimal lighting and sound quality while assisting the primary camera operator with technical setups and scene framing.

coverImage.alt: Dashboard components laid out on a workspace

projects.summary: A Guess Game built with JavaScript is an interactive web app where players try to guess a randomly generated number within a set range, receiving feedback like “Too high” or “Too low” until they guess correctly.
